summary_en: 77,500 shares (0.40% of S/O) acquired for ¥35.96M via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-28. Program authorized 2026-05-27; execution completed same day. Rationale: mitigate short-term market impact from shareholder sale and enable flexible capital allocation.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Share Buyback via ToSTNeT-3 Self-Tender Transaction
translation_en_brief: Nihon Plast announced completion of a share buyback program on 2026-05-28. The company acquired 77,500 shares (0.40% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury) for a total of ¥35.96M using the ToSTNeT-3 off-hours matching method on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The program was authorized and executed on the same day (2026-05-27 board resolution). The stated rationale was to mitigate the short-term market impact from a shareholder's intention to sell shares held in the company, thereby reducing the impact on existing shareholders, while also enabling flexible capital allocation in response to changing business circumstances.
